title: Draft RBI (Payments Banks – Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI proposes revised IFR rules requiring payments banks to maintain reserves up to 2% of investment portfolios. The move balances risk management with operational flexibility.
The post Draft RBI (Payments Banks – Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
